findings.evidence: `rg` shows the roadmap names only `trace_eq_zero_of_sq_ratCast` at `TauCetiRoadmap/EffectiveBounds/README.md:97-100`; the only TauCeti use of the general theorem is inside this file at lines 77 and 112.
findings.fix: Make the general finite-extension trace lemma private/internal and keep the public `NumberField.trace_eq_zero_of_sq_ratCast` plus `Algebra.discr_one_self_eq_of_sq` API, unless an actual downstream target needs the general trace theorem directly.
findings.issue: `TauCeti.Algebra.trace_eq_zero_of_sq_algebraMap_of_not_mem_range` is a new public theorem even though the named downstream target only asks for `NumberField.trace_eq_zero_of_sq_ratCast` and the discriminant computation.

summary: The exposed surface is larger than the EffectiveBounds target needs: the roadmap asks for the number-field helper and square-root discriminant evaluation, but the PR also exports the general finite-extension trace theorem.
